purpose: Complete REST API reference for the Synapse SSE server: 22 endpoints (21 REST + 1 SSE) covering dashboards CRUD, statuses, initialization/logs/progress reads, dispatchable tasks, archives, history, queue, and overview. Documents path sanitization, request/response shapes, status codes, and side effects.
gotchas: Path params sanitized by sanitizePathParam — rejects ../, /, \, and >100 chars
Dashboard IDs are 6-char hex (no fixed cap on count)
Save-history is idempotent; returns alreadySaved:true if file exists
Clear endpoint archives + saves history + resets — destructive
patterns: Consistent { error: string } body for failures
Status derivation by scanning progress files
